items.name: code-review-response
items.title: Code Review Response
items.description: Process code-review feedback with technical rigour — understand each point, check it against the actual codebase, and respond with reasoning or implementation rather than reflexive agreement. Use when you receive review comments (from a human, the code-reviewer agent, or any reviewer) and are about to act on them, especially if any feedback seems unclear or wrong.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
